title: How to revert from a dropdown board to a tab board
excerpt: Originally when I started Using Monday.com I had tabs along the top of my Kanban board. However after me clicking something it has switched to a dropdown. How do I revert this back to a tab view?

posts.author: jedGlurbs (Jed)
posts.cookedHtml:
image250×369 10.3 KB

Originally when I started Using Monday.com I had tabs along the top of my Kanban board. However after me clicking something it has switched to a dropdown. How do I revert this back to a tab view?

posts.author: shannon-cxmonday (Shannon Thao)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Jed! Welcome to the monday Community! Great question! Your board views will change from tabs to a dropdown menu depending on whether you have collapsed or expanded your board views with the highlighted dropdown arrow below:

image1623×242 32 KB

When I collapse my board views, you’ll see the dropdown menu you’ve referenced appears:

image1617×206 29 KB

I hope this helps!

posts.author: Kofi (Kofi FiftyTechSolutions.com)
posts.cookedHtml: Thank you, I was starting to get a bit stressed haha
